{{Infobox concept
| name = Reader burn
| introduced = Of Shadow and Sea
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Reader]] burn is a physical and mental affliction experienced by [[Readers]] when they overextend their abilities or attempt to manipulate more power than their bodies can handle. This condition manifests as intense cranial pain, often described as a sensation of being crushed, a throbbing headache, or a feeling similar to swallowing snow. In severe cases, the pain can be debilitating enough to knock an individual unconscious or render them useless. The ailment occurs when a [[Reader]]'s capacity for using their powers exceeds their physical constitution, such as when they attempt to perform active [[Reading]] too quickly or interact with exceptionally powerful [[Intent]]. While it can be triggered by the rapid [[Awakening]] of objects, it is also a risk when attempting to examine the [[Intent]] of [[Elders]] or [[Imperial relics]], which can lead to insanity or madness.}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Reader burn]] is a painful sensation experienced by [[Readers]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c19">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Reader burn]] is a phenomenon that can distract [[Lucan]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c15">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Lucan]] experiences a [[Reader burn]] in his head.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c15" />}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Of Kings and Killers ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Calder]] experiences the beginnings of [[Reader burn]] in his head.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c14">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Focusing on a [[Reader's trance]] can cause a sensation known as [[Reader burn]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c18">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 18</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Reader burn]] is a weakness that occurs when a [[Reader]]'s ability outpaces their constitution.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c22">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 22</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Of Killers and Kings ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Lucan]]'s experience was not yet full-on [[Reader burn]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c9">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Of Kings and Killers]]
[[Category:Of Shadow and Sea]]
[[Category:Of Darkness and Dawn]]
[[Category:Of Killers and Kings]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire concepts]]
[[Category:Terminology]]
